title: linum usitatissimum var. usitatissimum
intro: Linum usitatissimum var. usitatissimum, commonly known as oilseed flax or true flax, is a plant species that belongs to the family Linaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Linum usitatissimum var. usitatissimum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or oil form, or used as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
